metadata.description: Универсальное NMS-приложение ISPF (it-infra-monitoring). Объекты площадки подключаются site-плагинами.

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS itm_sla_daily (   site_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,   metric_date DATE NOT NULL,   availability_pct DOUBLE PRECISION,   packet_loss_pct DOUBLE PRECISION,   mean_rtt_ms DOUBLE PRECISION,   PRIMARY KEY (site_id, metric_date) ); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS itm_traffic_top (   site_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,   recorded_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),   src_host VARCHAR(128),   dst_host VARCHAR(128),   bytes BIGINT,   protocol VARCHAR(32) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS itm_traffic_top_site_time ON itm_traffic_top (site_id, recorded_at DESC);

reports.title: Активные аварии
reports.description: Список активных тревог (узлы offline / линки down). Пусто, если аварий нет.

reports.title: Top трафик
reports.query: SELECT recorded_at, src_host, dst_host, bytes, protocol FROM itm_traffic_top ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 200

reports.title: SLA сводка
reports.query: SELECT site_id, metric_date, availability_pct, packet_loss_pct, mean_rtt_ms FROM itm_sla_daily ORDER BY metric_date DESC

reports.title: Top DCN by Utilization
reports.description: ifOperStatus / скорость порта по сетевым устройствам

reports.title: IP SLA Top 10
reports.query: SELECT site_id, metric_date, availability_pct, packet_loss_pct, mean_rtt_ms FROM itm_sla_daily ORDER BY packet_loss_pct DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

blueprints.name: itm-hub-v1
blueprints.description: ITM monitoring hub (KPI aggregates, event journal anchor)

variables.name: siteLabel
variables.description: Active site label for operator UI

variables.name: activeAlarmsFeed
variables.description: Active topology / device alarms as a list (empty when healthy)

objects.name: itm-dcn-placeholder
objects.displayName: DCN placeholder (replace via site topology plugin)
